Petition To Administrator To Have Bond Reduced To $50,000 And To Deposit Assets Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Stanley Drasky.

Mr. Freedman withdrew the petition stating that Mr. Drasky now qualified for a bond and stated that he would proceed with filing of the bond. The petition is withdrawn.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
